summary: Comprehensive testing of enhanced WYSIWYG document editor with detail views, Vorlagen system, and Kalkulation tab. All 31 backend tests passed. All frontend features working correctly including: 3-column layout (340px/flex/300px), left sidebar detail view with full description, 'Ins Dokument' and 'Bearbeiten' buttons, right sidebar Vorlagen/Kalkulation tabs, similar docs expansion, position copying, bookmark/template toggle, drag & drop, and save functionality.

design_issues.screen: WYSIWYG Editor - Right sidebar similar docs
design_issues.issue: HTML nesting warning: <button> cannot contain nested <button> - bookmark button inside expandable doc button. Cosmetic React hydration warning, doesn't affect functionality.
Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' - cosmetic React hydration warning in mobile service/article dropdowns

passed_tests: Backend: /api/documents/suggestions/quote returns templates and similar docs
Backend: /api/documents/suggestions/order returns templates and similar docs
Backend: /api/documents/suggestions/invoice returns templates and similar docs
Backend: /api/documents/suggestions with customer_id filter works
Backend: /api/documents/suggestions with current_positions filter works
Backend: /api/documents/quote/{id}/template toggles is_template flag
Backend: /api/documents/order/{id}/template toggles is_template flag
Backend: /api/documents/invoice/{id}/template toggles is_template flag
Backend: Toggle non-existent document returns 404
Backend: Template appears in suggestions after being marked
Backend: All 21 WYSIWYG editor tests pass (auth, CRUD, PDF)
Frontend: 3-column layout visible (340px left, flex center, 300px right)
Frontend: Left sidebar search input present
Frontend: Left sidebar Services/Articles tabs working
Frontend: Click on item opens expanded detail view
Frontend: Detail view shows full description (not truncated)
Frontend: 'Ins Dokument' button adds position to document
Frontend: Toast notification shown when item added
Frontend: 'Bearbeiten' button navigates to /services page
Frontend: Right sidebar Vorlagen/Kalkulation tabs present
Frontend: Vorlagen tab shows templates section
Frontend: Vorlagen tab shows similar documents (Ähnliche Angebot)
Frontend: Click on similar doc expands to show positions
Frontend: 'Positionen übernehmen' button copies positions from similar doc
Frontend: Bookmark button marks doc as template (toast: 'Als Vorlage markiert')
Frontend: Kalkulation tab shows Erlöse section (Netto, MwSt, Brutto)
Frontend: Kalkulation tab shows cost price inputs per position
Frontend: Margin calculation appears when cost entered (Marge, Marge %)
Frontend: Drag & drop - 3 draggable items found
Frontend: Document drop zone present
Frontend: Save button works - redirects to quotes list
critical_code_review_comments: HTML nesting issue: In right sidebar similar docs, bookmark button is nested inside expandable doc button (line ~1637). Should restructure to avoid button-in-button.
Mobile dropdown issue: <span> inside <option> in mobile service/article dropdowns (line ~1236). Should use plain text instead of span wrapper.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced WYSIWYG editor fully tested. Key features: Left sidebar (340px) with detail view expansion, 'Ins Dokument' and 'Bearbeiten' buttons. Right sidebar (300px) with Vorlagen tab (templates + similar docs with position copying) and Kalkulation tab (cost inputs, margin calculation). All APIs working: /api/documents/suggestions/{type} and /api/documents/{type}/{id}/template. Minor HTML nesting warnings in console but no functional issues.
